title.en: CDMG PHY (Clause 24): China's 60 GHz Directional Multi-Gigabit
title.zh: CDMG 物理层（第24章）：中国版 60 GHz 定向多吉比特

blocks.en: Tucked into IEEE 802.11-2024 as Clause 24 is a PHY almost nobody outside China ever touches: the China Directional Multi-Gigabit (CDMG) PHY. It is a 60 GHz millimetre-wave PHY that runs *parallel* to the much better-known Clause 20 DMG PHY (the one 802.11ad uses). They look like twins — same Golay-sequence preamble, same three operating modes, same sector-sweep beamforming dance — yet CDMG needed its own clause. The reason isn't the radio science; it's regulation. CDMG is the same mmWave idea re-channelised and re-masked to fit China's 60 GHz spectrum rules.
blocks.zh: 在 IEEE 802.11-2024 中，第24章藏着一个中国以外几乎无人接触的物理层：中国定向多吉比特（CDMG）物理层。它是一个 60 GHz 毫米波物理层，与更广为人知的第20章 DMG 物理层（即 802.11ad 所用的那个）*并行*存在。两者看起来像双胞胎——同样的 Golay 序列前导、同样的三种工作模式、同样的扇区扫描波束成形流程——然而 CDMG 却需要单独成章。原因不在无线电科学，而在监管。CDMG 就是同一个毫米波思路，按中国的 60 GHz 频谱规则重新做了信道划分和频谱模板。

blocks.en: The big-picture takeaway: CDMG is a *regulatory fork* of DMG. When the same physical-layer idea has to live under a different country's spectrum mask and channel plan, the standard sometimes copies the engineering wholesale and only swaps the regulatory framing. Recognising that pattern explains why 802.11 has near-duplicate clauses.
blocks.zh: 宏观要点：CDMG 是 DMG 的一个*监管分叉*。当同一个物理层思路必须在另一个国家的频谱模板和信道规划下运行时，标准有时会原样照搬工程设计，只替换监管框架。认清这个模式，就能理解为什么 802.11 会出现近乎重复的章节。

blocks.en: Start with what makes CDMG *China-specific*. Clause 20 DMG uses 2.16 GHz-wide channels; CDMG narrows that to a 1.08 GHz channel width (24.1.1). The channel plan is its own: channel centre = 56.16 GHz + spacing × (channel number mod 32), and a CDMG STA must support at least channel numbers 2, 35 and 36 (24.3.1). The transmit mask is also re-drawn for the regulatory domain: 0 dBr bandwidth not exceeding 0.94 GHz, then −17 dBr at 0.6 GHz offset, −22 dBr at 1.35 GHz, and −30 dBr from 1.53 GHz outward (24.3.2). Those three things — narrower channels, a China channel list, and a China transmit mask — are the heart of why this clause exists.
blocks.zh: 先看 CDMG 的*中国特性*。第20章 DMG 使用 2.16 GHz 宽的信道；CDMG 把它收窄为 1.08 GHz 信道带宽（24.1.1）。信道规划也是自成一套：信道中心频率 = 56.16 GHz + 间隔 ×（信道号 mod 32），且 CDMG 站点至少要支持信道号 2、35 和 36（24.3.1）。发射频谱模板同样为该监管域重新绘制：0 dBr 带宽不超过 0.94 GHz，随后在 0.6 GHz 偏移处为 −17 dBr，1.35 GHz 处为 −22 dBr，1.53 GHz 及以上为 −30 dBr（24.3.2）。这三点——更窄的信道、中国的信道列表、以及中国的发射模板——正是这一章存在的核心原因。

blocks.en: Now the inheritance from DMG. CDMG keeps the same three-mode architecture. The **Control mode** (MCS 0, DBPSK, ~13.75 Mb/s) is the robust low-rate signalling mode — it carries the sector-sweep frames and is mandatory (24.4). The **Single-Carrier (SC) mode** (MCS 1–16, π/2-BPSK up through π/2-64-QAM, up to ~3.45 Gb/s) is the high-throughput workhorse (24.5). And there is a third, **low-power SC mode** (MCS 17–23) that exists to cut transceiver processing power — but the 2024 standard flags it as **obsolete** and warns it may be removed (24.6.1). Every mode shares one common preamble (24.3.6).
blocks.zh: 再看从 DMG 继承的部分。CDMG 保留了相同的三模式架构。**控制模式**（MCS 0，DBPSK，约 13.75 Mb/s）是稳健的低速率信令模式——它承载扇区扫描帧，且为强制支持（24.4）。**单载波（SC）模式**（MCS 1–16，从 π/2-BPSK 一直到 π/2-64-QAM，最高约 3.45 Gb/s）是高吞吐的主力（24.5）。还有第三种，**低功耗 SC 模式**（MCS 17–23），其存在是为了降低收发机处理功耗——但 2024 版标准将其标注为**已废弃**，并警告可能被移除（24.6.1）。所有模式共用一个公共前导（24.3.6）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 640 230' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12'><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='40' width='150' height='38'/><rect x='160' y='40' width='70' height='38'/><rect x='230' y='40' width='60' height='38'/><rect x='290' y='40' width='110' height='38'/><rect x='400' y='40' width='110' height='38'/><rect x='510' y='40' width='110' height='38'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='85' y='30'>Short Training field (STF)</text><text x='85' y='63'>16x Ga128</text><text x='195' y='63'>SFS</text><text x='195' y='30'>I/Q est.</text><text x='260' y='63'>-Ga128</text><text x='345' y='30'>Channel Estimation field (CEF)</text><text x='345' y='63'>Gu512</text><text x='455' y='63'>Gv512</text><text x='565' y='63'>Gv128</text></g><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='130' width='120' height='38'/><rect x='130' y='130' width='110' height='38'/><rect x='240' y='130' width='90' height='38'/><rect x='330' y='130' width='150' height='38'/><rect x='480' y='130' width='140' height='38'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='320' y='118'>CDMG SC mode PPDU</text><text x='70' y='153'>Preamble</text><text x='70' y='166'>(STF+CEF)</text><text x='185' y='153'>Header</text><text x='285' y='153'>BLK ...</text><text x='405' y='153'>Data (BLKs)</text><text x='550' y='153'>AGC + TRN</text><text x='550' y='166'>subfields</text></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11'><text x='320' y='205'>STF + CE use Golay sequences (Ga128/Gb128/Gu512/Gv512); same as Clause 20 DMG.</text><text x='320' y='220'>CDMG difference: 1.08 GHz channel, China channel plan, China transmit mask.</text></g></svg>

caption.en: The CDMG common preamble (top) and the SC-mode PPDU (bottom). The STF is 16 repetitions of Ga128 plus a single-frequency sequence (SFS) for I/Q-imbalance estimation, then -Ga128; the CEF concatenates Gu512, Gv512 and Gv128. This Golay-sequence structure is inherited straight from DMG — only the channelisation and mask differ.
caption.zh: CDMG 公共前导（上）与 SC 模式 PPDU（下）。STF 由 16 个 Ga128 重复序列加一个用于 I/Q 失衡估计的单频序列（SFS）、再加单个 -Ga128 组成；CEF 则串接 Gu512、Gv512 和 Gv128。这种 Golay 序列结构直接继承自 DMG——不同的只有信道划分和频谱模板。

blocks.en: Beamforming, too, is borrowed wholesale. CDMG uses the same two-stage flow as DMG: a **sector-level sweep (SLS)** to find a coarse direction, then **beam refinement (BRP)** to fine-tune the antenna weight vectors. During the transmit sector sweep the frames are CDMG Control-mode PPDUs; receive sector-sweep PPDUs may be Control or SC mode (24.9.2.1). CDMG does add one twist on top of DMG beam refinement — *enhanced beam tracking* (24.9.2.2): a STA keeps a measured backup link ready, so when the primary 60 GHz beam is blocked (a hand, a body, a rotating tablet) it can switch to the alternative link instead of dropping. BRP PPDUs append an extra STF + CE field at the end purely to measure that backup link.
blocks.zh: 波束成形同样是整体借用。CDMG 采用与 DMG 相同的两阶段流程：先用**扇区级扫描（SLS）**找到粗略方向，再用**波束细化（BRP）**精调天线权重向量。发送扇区扫描时帧为 CDMG 控制模式 PPDU；接收扇区扫描 PPDU 可为控制模式或 SC 模式（24.9.2.1）。CDMG 在 DMG 波束细化之上确实加了一个新花样——*增强波束跟踪*（24.9.2.2）：站点随时准备好一条已测量的备用链路，这样当主 60 GHz 波束被遮挡（一只手、一个身体、一台转动的平板）时，它可以切换到备用链路而非掉线。BRP PPDU 在末尾追加一段额外的 STF + CE 字段，专门用于测量这条备用链路。

summary.en: What CDMG borrows verbatim vs. what it actually changes
summary.zh: CDMG 逐字照搬了什么，又真正改了什么

blocks.en: Clause 24 is unusually explicit about reuse: HCS calculation (24.3.7), the common LDPC parity matrices (24.3.8), the scrambler (24.3.9) and RCPI measurement (24.3.10) are each stated to be 'the same as that contained in' the matching Clause 20 subclause. Even the SC-mode header encoding, data-field encoding and the π/2-BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM mappings defer to Clause 20. So the genuine deltas are narrow: (1) the 1.08 GHz channel width and China channel plan (24.1.1, 24.3.1) with the 56.16 GHz starting frequency; (2) the China transmit spectrum mask (24.3.2); (3) the chip rate Fc = 880 MHz (vs DMG's 1.76 GHz), which halves throughput-per-symbol-class; (4) the optional low-power SC mode (MCS 17-23, RS+block-code coding) that DMG does not have, now marked obsolete (24.6.1); and (5) enhanced beam tracking with a backup-link STF+CE appendage (24.9.2.2). The PHY identifies itself in the MIB as dot11PHYType = cdmg(12). Note the standard's own caveat that the LDPC matrices and π/2-64-QAM constellation are reused from DMG, so CDMG is not a clean-sheet design — it is DMG with a regulatory and channelisation overlay.
blocks.zh: 第24章对复用的说明异常直白：HCS 计算（24.3.7）、公共 LDPC 校验矩阵（24.3.8）、扰码器（24.3.9）和 RCPI 测量（24.3.10）都被明确写为'与第20章对应小节相同'。甚至 SC 模式的头部编码、数据字段编码以及 π/2-BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM 映射也都援引第20章。因此真正的差异很窄：(1) 1.08 GHz 信道带宽与中国信道规划（24.1.1、24.3.1），起始频率 56.16 GHz；(2) 中国发射频谱模板（24.3.2）；(3) 码片速率 Fc = 880 MHz（相对 DMG 的 1.76 GHz），使每个符号类别的吞吐减半；(4) DMG 所没有的可选低功耗 SC 模式（MCS 17–23，RS+分组码编码），现已标注为废弃（24.6.1）；以及 (5) 带备用链路 STF+CE 附加段的增强波束跟踪（24.9.2.2）。该物理层在 MIB 中以 dot11PHYType = cdmg(12) 标识自己。需注意标准自身的说明：LDPC 矩阵和 π/2-64-QAM 星座都复用自 DMG，因此 CDMG 并非全新设计——它是叠加了监管与信道划分外衣的 DMG。

cites.note: 24.1.1 Scope — 1.08 GHz channel vs Clause 20 DMG 2.16 GHz; three modulation methods (control, SC, low-power SC); common preamble
24.3.1 Channelization (56.16 GHz start, ch 2/35/36) and 24.3.2 Transmit mask (0.94 GHz 0 dBr, -17/-22/-30 dBr breakpoints)
24.3.6.2 Short training field (16x Ga128 + SFS + -Ga128); 24.3.6.3 Channel estimation field (Gu512/Gv512/Gv128); 24.3.7 HCS reuse from 20.3.7
24.4.2 CDMG control mode PPDU format (Fig 24-4); 24.5.2 SC PPDU format (Fig 24-6)
24.6.1 CDMG low-power SC mode introduction — optional, lower processing power, marked obsolete
24.9.2.1 Sector-level sweep (control-mode Tx sweep); 24.9.2.2 Beam refinement and enhanced beam tracking with backup-link STF+CE
